heading: Government facilities; use of
label: 4104 Government facilities; use of
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 2307, , .July 7, 1958Pub. L. 85–507, § 872 Stat. 331In paragraph (2), the words “other agencies in any branch of the Government” and “the other agencies” are coextensive with and substituted for “other departments, and with other agencies in any branch of the Government” and “such other departments and agencies”. This is so because “other agencies in any branch of the Government” is broader than “agency” as defined for the purpose of this chapter in section 4101(1).Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 2307, , .July 7, 1958Pub. L. 85–507, § 872 Stat. 331In paragraph (2), the words “other agencies in any branch of the Government” and “the other agencies” are coextensive with and substituted for “other departments, and with other agencies in any branch of the Government” and “such other departments and agencies”. This is so because “other agencies in any branch of the Government” is broader than “agency” as defined for the purpose of this chapter in section 4101(1).Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

children.text: provide for training, insofar as practicable, by, in, and through Government facilities under the jurisdiction or control of the agency; and

children.label: A
children.text: use of Government facilities under the jurisdiction or control of the other agencies in any branch of the Government; and

children.label: B
children.text: extension to employees of the agency of training programs of other agencies.
